film.title: Love Comes Softly
film.overview: Nineteen year old pioneer woman Marty has recently married. She goes west with her husband Clem, hoping to start a new life. But Clem unexpectedly dies, and Marty finds herself alone, two months pregnant. Widower Clark offers her a marriage of convenience: she needs food and money, and he needs someone to take care of his daughter Missie. She accepts his proposal as a temporary solution.

dialogues.dialogue: At a time.  My mama made beautiful quilts.  Hers would put this here pattern to shame.  She made quilts for all the neighbors when they had their babies.  I'm sure they appreciated that.
dialogues.cause_raw: not making quilts as good as her mother

dialogues.dialogue: In fact, if someone had told me that I would find myself here today... I would have called them crazy.  I would have called them crazy.  I was sure of myself and where I was headed... stubborn and full of pride.  stubborn and full of pride.  I was in control.
dialogues.cause_raw: being in control and sure of oneself

dialogues.dialogue: I would have called them crazy.  I was sure of myself and where I was headed... stubborn and full of pride.  stubborn and full of pride.  I was in control.  Or so I thought.
[Sighs]  I bet little Aaron has you thinkin' on his pa a lot lately, huh?  He would have been so happy... and proud to have a son.  and proud to have a son.  Babies are a testament to love.

I bet little Aaron has you thinkin' on his pa a lot lately, huh?  He would have been so happy... and proud to have a son.  and proud to have a son.  Babies are a testament to love.  They're livin' proof of what you and your husband share together.
